headline: ComEd Restores Power to Over 240,000 Customers as Crews Push Through Holiday Weekend to Finish Restoration
summary: CHICAGO, July 05, 2026--ComEd crews are entering the final stretch of restoration efforts after four rounds of severe weather swept across northern Illinois beginning Thursday night, with additional storms rolling through Friday and a fourth system striking on Saturday. In total, nearly 297,000 customers were impacted across the service territory. As of 11:30 a.m. Sunday, ComEd had restored power to more than 283,000 customers, with roughly 14,000 remaining without service. About 95 percent of i
